programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Garcelle is in the hot seat when a distraught Erika leaves the trip early, but she refuses to roast alone. On their last day in the desert, the women wake up to a stunning exposé that leaves Kyle, Lisa and Dorit with questions. Meanwhile, Sutton calls an emergency meeting among the group - but not everyone makes the guest list.

programs.title: Judge Jerry
programs.desc: A man claims he rented his former friend a room in his home and is now suing him for $5,000 for unpaid rent!

programs.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programs.desc: Comic Nikki Glaser; actor Randall Park; businessperson Bozoma Saint John; Nathaniel Rateliff & The Night Sweats perform.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Shockwaves from an unexpected news article continue to spread as the ladies try to piece together the truth; Garcelle serves up a Haitian holiday meal for her family; When Kyle gathers the ladies for Christmas dinner, holiday cheer turns to jeer.

programs.title: Million Dollar Listing: LA
programs.desc: Josh Altman heads to an exclusive enclave to try to snag a record-breaking listing. Madison gains some momentum with a potential buyer, but his relationship with James might crash the deal.

programs.title: Shark Tank
programs.desc: A learning platform to empower students to reach their creative potential through art; an oat-based spread; a boozy spin on a wedding day essential.
